case_title: MCMAHON, DENNIS et al vs. EIRANET et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GOWEN, GEORGE DBA EIRANET

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOWEN, GEORGE DBA EIRANET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 965 FOLSOM ST, #304 & 306 $27,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,000.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-23-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, SAID JUDGMENT MAY BE PARTIALLY SASTISFIED BY DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY IS REMAINING AFTER PLTF'S INSPECTION OF PROPERTY; DEFT. LIABLE FOR ANY JUDGMENT AMOUNTS WITHSTANDING AFTER SECURITY DEPOSIT. (SEE FILED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GOWEN, GEORGE DBA EIRANET ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCMAHON, DENNIS MAHONY, JAMES COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-11-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 606 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT. 606, CMITCHELL, JUDGE; PYEN, CLERK; DNEVILLE, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY MPETERS, ESQ, DEF GEORGE GOWEN APPR IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLES PRIOR TO TRIAL AND TERMS PLACED ON RECORD. PLNTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT OF $27000 TO WHICH $20,468.68 SECURITY DEPOIT NOW HELD BY PLAINTIFF WILL BE APPLIED. BALANCE TO BE PAID WITHIN 60 DAYS. DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES LOCATED AT 965 FOLSOM STREET #304 AND 306 BY 23 SEP 2000. LEASE IS FORFEITED. CASE REMOVED FROM TRIAL CALENDAR. PLNTF COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
